# mailgun_template_versions (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all versions for a Mailgun template.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name that owns the template.
- `template_name` (String) The name of the template to list versions for.

### Read-Only

- `total_count` (Number) The total number of versions found.
- `versions` (Attributes List) List of template versions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `versions`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this version is active.
- `comment` (String) The comment for this version.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the version was created.
- `engine` (String) The templating engine used (handlebars or go).
- `tag` (String) The version tag identifier.
